summary: Created the initial high-density, layered waveform view. Used a smooth path for the waveform, top/bottom markers for beat comparison, and color-coded highlights for drift. Toggles are styled divs.

Failed convergence. Identified 2 HIGH severity accessibility issues (non-semantic controls, color-only indicators) and 2 MEDIUM issues (inaccurate data representation, visual clutter from connector lines).

Addressed all of Nico's feedback. Changed toggles to <button>s with aria-pressed. Replaced smooth path with a polyline-based area chart. Added a hatch pattern for high-severity drift and removed connector lines. Moved lyrics to a dedicated track.

Passed convergence. All HIGH severity issues from R1 were resolved. A new, non-blocking MEDIUM issue was noted regarding visual clarity when many waveforms are layered. A LOW issue for adding an SVG title was also noted.
The design has met the convergence criteria and is approved for implementation.
